active_alerts.description: Orchestrator stalled 128+ min. Tech Lead cron has not produced output since ~03:15 UTC. Director issued Directives 14-16 (daemon restart + 3 mandates) but Tech Lead did not act on them. Daemon was zombie (shutdown_requested=true, 6 processes idle) — killed by Ops. Uncommitted state preserved in commit 7c1850b.
active_alerts.action_taken: Committed uncommitted state (7c1850b). Killed 6 zombie daemon processes. Removed stale PID file. Orchestrator needs to restart daemon and queue pending mandates per Directives 14-16.
